title: Fossil Mod
description: adds fossil blocks that drop bones
body:
[![Logo](https://img1.wsimg.com/isteam/ip/b3784fc8-73a8-4ed5-9033-feb6c6f2806c/blob-19e676c.png/:/rs=w:149,h:149,cg:true,m/cr=w:149,h:149/qt=q:95)](https://exlinemods.com/) Explore Exline Mods for top-notch gaming accessories and mods. Elevate your gaming experience with our high-quality products. Visit exlinemods.com now to gear up and enhance your gameplay! Fossil Mod
This mod adds new fossil blocks that you can mine. Also, there are now random cracks in grass that you can dig up with a shovel to get a fossil! There is now an Archeologist that you can trade fossils with and they will sell you fossil models!
So, basically it is bone ore and you can smelt the fossil down to bone if you want, or use it for decoration! - Now you can sell them to the Archeologist!
It's not much but I think it adds something that is missing from vanilla Minecraft
Archeology Table - Spawns Archeologist
